title: Human Resource & Admin Associate |INX-B01
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION

  • Assist in recruitment coordination, onboarding, and employee record management
  • Support HR activities such as leave tracking, claims processing, and staff inquiries
  • Help organize employee engagement activities and internal events
  • Provide general administrative support including scheduling, filing, and correspondence
  • Maintain office supplies, equipment, and a tidy work environment
  • Assist in updating HR policies, documents, and compliance records
  • Support payroll and benefits administration as needed
  • Act as a helpful point of contact for staff and visitors

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Diploma and above
  • Training will be provided
  • Discreet, professional, and approachable demeanor
  • Organized with strong attention to detail
  • Comfortable handling confidential information

EA License Number: 25C2980

Disclaimer:

By applying, you consent to the collection and use of your personal data for recruitment purposes in accordance with Singapore’s PDPA. Your application may be considered for this and other suitable roles.

postedCompany.description:
McKin Talent Solutions is a trusted provider of end-to-end talent solutions, offering expertise in payroll outsourcing, Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), and comprehensive HR support to help businesses streamline their workforce management. We specialise in managing the entire recruitment process from talent sourcing and screening to onboarding, ensuring efficiency, compliance, and quality hires. Our services extend to executive search, contract staffing, talent acquisition, and HR consultancy, providing strategic advice to optimise human capital and enhance organisational performance. With a focus on accuracy and compliance, our payroll outsourcing solutions allow companies to save time, reduce administrative burden, and focus on their core business. We also provide flexible workforce arrangements to meet seasonal, project-based, or specialised staffing needs, making us the ideal partner for businesses seeking agile talent solutions. 


At McKin Talent Solutions, we prioritise understanding each client’s unique requirements, tailoring solutions that align with their goals and industry demands. Our commitment to professionalism, transparency, and results has earned us the trust of businesses across industries, while our people-first approach ensures both employers and candidates benefit from long-term, mutually rewarding relationships. Whether you require ongoing recruitment support, a one-off hiring project, or a complete outsourcing of your recruitment function, McKin Talent Solutions delivers solutions that drive growth, efficiency, and sustainable success.
postedCompany.name: MCKIN TALENT SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
